# Vendor Dependencies

This directory is reserved for local-only external dependencies that are intentionally not tracked in the main Musopti repository.

Expected local clones:

- `vendor/esp-idf`
- `vendor/waveshare-esp32-c6-touch-amoled-1.8`

Suggested setup:

```bash
git clone https://github.com/espressif/esp-idf.git vendor/esp-idf
git clone https://github.com/waveshareteam/ESP32-C6-Touch-AMOLED-1.8.git vendor/waveshare-esp32-c6-touch-amoled-1.8
```
